actionLibraryList.title: Mat Lying Toe Taps
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with arms by your sides. Bend the hips and knees to tabletop position (90°), keeping a neutral spine and core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, engage the abdominals, maintain pelvic stability, and lower one leg in a controlled manner, lightly tapping the toes on the floor without moving the torso.
3.Inhale, return the leg to tabletop position.
4.Exhale, switch to the other leg and repeat the toe tap, alternating sides. Maintain core stability and controlled rhythm throughout the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688634189.jpg","context":"1.Keep the lower back stable, pressing the sacrum into the mat.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck, allowing them to sink downward."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to engage and lower the leg.
Inhale to return with control.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid arching or sagging the lower back.
2.Do not lower the legs too quickly or use momentum to tap the toes.
3.Keep the shoulders relaxed; avoid shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Roll Like a Ball
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit tall, finding balance between the sit bones and tailbone. Curl the spine into a C-shape, bend the knees, and lift the feet off the mat. Hug the front of the shins with both hands. Keep the abdominals engaged, shoulders away from the ears, elbows naturally open, and gaze toward the knees or thighs. Inhale to prepare.
2.Inhale, draw the abdominals inward toward the spine, maintaining the rounded spine as you roll backward. Articulate the spine sequentially until the shoulder blades touch the mat. Avoid rolling onto the neck.
3.Exhale, engage the core to maintain the spinal curve and roll forward back to the balanced position on the sit bones. Control the movement; do not let the feet drop.
4.Repeat the rolling motion following the breath, maintaining tight abdominals and a rounded spine throughout.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770689639653.jpg","context":"1.Let the shoulders relax and sink.\n2.Maintain the spinal curve."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Inhale to roll backward.
Exhale to roll forward and return to balance.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid rolling onto the neck or letting the head drop backward.
2.Do not use the legs to swing or rely on momentum.
3.Maintain the C-curve; avoid sagging the back or losing spinal articulation.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Low Swan
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie prone with palms on the mat beside the chest, shoulders relaxed away from the ears, elbows naturally bent, and legs extended straight and as close together as possible. Keep the head, neck, and spine aligned. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, engage the abdominals, slide the shoulder blades down, place the forearms on the mat with elbows directly under the shoulders, and extend the spine.
3.Inhale, maintain length at the top, extending the neck along the spine, lifting only as much as is comfortable in the lower back.
4.Exhale, control with the core, and sequentially lower the torso back to the mat. Return to the starting position and repeat.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770690056957.jpg","context":"1.Keep the lower body stable on the mat.\n2.Relax and lower the shoulders and neck."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Inhale to extend and lift.
Exhale to control the descent.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and avoid compensating by pushing forcefully with the arms.
2.Avoid collapsing the lower back or over-compressing the lumbar spine.
3.Avoid lifting the head too high; keep the neck aligned without excessive backward tilt.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Saw Prep
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit upright on your sit bones with legs extended and hip-width apart, arms extended to the sides at shoulder height. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, keeping the spine tall, and rotate the torso to the left, bringing the right arm over the legs.
3.Inhale to return to center.
4.Exhale as you rotate the spine to the right. Alternate sides continuously.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770689774645.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down.\n2.Anchor the sit bones on the mat, maintain a neutral pelvis, and avoid overarching the lower back."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to rotate.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
2.Keep the pelvis and core stable; do not let the lower back sag.
3.Maintain control; do not swing with momentum.

actionLibraryList.title: Lying Straight Down
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, brace your core, keep the arms straight, and drive the movement from the back as you press both arms down along your sides toward the outer thighs.
2.As the arms press down, keep the pelvis and spine stable. Maintain the tabletop position—do not let the legs shift or rock with the arm movement.
3.Inhale and, resisting the cable tension, slowly return the arms to the start with control, maintaining constant tension.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770626631633.jpg","context":"1.Bend the knees and hips to lift both legs into a tabletop position, with the knees stacked directly over the hips.\n2.Gently press the lower back into the mat and keep the pelvis stable.\n3.Relax the shoulders and let them drop away from the ears."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale as you press the arms straight down.
Inhale as you slowly return to the start.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the arms, shoulders, back, and core.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Do not let the legs move or pull the knees toward the chest.
2.Keep the lower back in contact with the mat and avoid rib flare.
3.Keep the elbows straight—do not bend the arms.
4.Do not shrug the shoulders or grip with the wrists.

actionLibraryList.title: Lying Triceps Press
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale as you pull the handles down toward your sides, bringing the palms toward the outer thighs.
2.Inhale, keeping the core engaged, and slowly return the arms to the starting position with control—avoid letting them drop quickly.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770626692481.jpg","context":"1.Position the knees directly above the hips in a stable tabletop.\n2.Press the lower back into the mat and keep the pelvis stable.\n3.Relax the shoulders and draw them down away from the ears."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to slowly return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the back, core, and arms.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the legs stable—avoid any wobbling.
2.Control the return—do not let them drop too quickly.
3.Keep the ribs neutral and shoulders down—avoid flaring or shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Lying Side Arm
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale and engage the back muscles as you smoothly lower the arms from the sides down toward the outer thighs.
2.As you pull down, draw the shoulder blades toward the spine and down—avoid shrugging or forcing with the shoulders.
3.Inhale and resist the tension as you slowly return the arms to the T-position, emphasizing control on the return.
4.Throughout, keep the legs in tabletop, and maintain a stable pelvis and spine.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770626672042.jpg","context":"1.Position the knees directly above the hips in a stable tabletop.\n2.Press the lower back into the mat and keep the pelvis stable.\n3.Relax the shoulders and draw them down away from the ears."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to pull the arms down.
Inhale to slowly return the arms.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the shoulders, back, and arms.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the ribs neutral—avoid flaring or collapsing the lower back.
2.Do not shrug the shoulders.
3.Keep the wrists straight—avoid bending them.
4.Keep the knees away from the chest.

actionLibraryList.title: Roll Down Round Back
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, draw the navel toward the spine, tuck the pelvis, and roll backward from the tailbone to form a C-curve in the spine.
2.Continue rolling the spine down, one vertebra at a time, until lying flat on the mat; keep the feet pressed into the mat, avoiding lifting or rocking.
3.Use abdominal engagement to roll the body back up, stacking the spine sequentially to return to a tall, seated position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628521526.jpg","context":"1.Keep the legs together, extended and locked.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid leaning backward with a straight back.
2.Keep shoulders and neck relaxed—no shrugging or compensation.
3.Keep both feet grounded.

actionLibraryList.title: Roll Down with Spine Twist
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit tall with arms extended straight. Start facing right, roll down from the right side while leaning back, then return to center. Repeat to the left side, rolling up from the left back to center.
2.Keep the lower body stable. As the torso moves to the opposite side, rotate the knees and roll the spine sequentially. Turn the torso to the right with knees shifting left, then roll up from the right side back to center.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628545113.jpg","context":"1.Keep the knees slightly bent with feet on the mat.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck downward.\n3.Extend the arms straight, locked at shoulder height."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the elbows locked; avoid bending or straightening them.
2.Keep both feet on the ground.
3.Avoid shrugging your shoulders.

actionLibraryList.title: Roll Down with Row
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale. Maintain a stable C-curve in the torso and bend the elbows to pull back horizontally.
2.Inhale. Slowly extend the arms back to the starting position against the cable resistance, avoiding a quick snap back.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628614179.jpg","context":"1.Extend both legs straight forward, together and locked.\n2.Lean the torso back about 45°, supported on the sacrum.\n3.Lift the arms to shoulder height, extended out to the sides."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Body stable, no swaying.
2.Shoulders and arms level.
3.Shoulders down and relaxed.

actionLibraryList.title: Roll Down with Twist Row
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Roll the torso down and lean back to about 45°, supported and stable. Exhale as you bend the right elbow and pull back, rotating the head and thoracic spine to look to the right. Inhale to return to center.
2.Exhale to pull back with the left elbow, rotating the thoracic spine to look left. Inhale to slowly return the straps. Alternate sides.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628596376.jpg","context":"1.Extend both legs straight forward with legs together and locked.\n2.Lean the torso back about 45°, supported on the sacrum.\n3.Raise the arms to shoulder height, extended out to the sides."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid any up-and-down body movement.
2.Keep both feet on the ground.
3.Avoid shrugging your shoulders.

actionLibraryList.title: Swan
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie prone with your arms naturally extended, forehead slightly lowered, spine elongated, and legs straight in contact with the mat. Inhale as you stabilize the shoulder blades downward, gently press the arms into the mat, and sequentially extend the upper back, opening the chest forward and upward while keeping the head and neck aligned with the spine.
2.Exhale as you engage the core and control the spine rolling down segment by segment, returning to the prone starting position. Repeat the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770687890084.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down and stable.\n2.Keep the legs stable and in contact with the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Inhale to extend the upper back and open the chest.
Exhale to engage the core and control the spine as it rolls down.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid pressing down with your arms and neglecting back engagement.
2.Avoid shrugging the shoulders or excessively tilting the neck backward.

actionLibraryList.title: Swan Swimming
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie prone, hands gripping the handles, spine long. Inhale, gently press the arms down, extending the upper back segment by segment into the Swan position.
2.At the top of the Swan, slightly draw the chest back while keeping the upper back extended, shoulder blades stable and down. Lift both legs off the mat to create posterior tension. With core and torso stable, perform small, controlled alternating swings: right hand with left leg, left hand with right leg. Maintain steady breathing.
3.Exhale, engage the core, and slowly lower the spine back down to prone position, segment by segment.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770687986974.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders down and stable."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
At the top, flap with steady breathing.
Inhale to reach upward, exhale to return down with control.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage Shoulders, Back, Core, and Legs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the back stable; avoid sagging the lower back.
2.Use small, controlled flaps; avoid swinging the arms or legs.

actionLibraryList.title: Side Kneeling Twist
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Bend the elbows and hold the band at chest height, engaging the core and keeping the pelvis stable. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, rotating through the thoracic spine to pull the band outward.
3.Inhale as the spine returns to neutral, controlling the torso to bring the band back to the starting position.
4.Maintain a neutral torso throughout, with the thighs facing forward.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628137151.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine.\n3.Keep the pelvis stable."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to return slowly.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down; avoid shrugging.
2.Maintain a neutral spine, keeping the pelvis and lower limbs stable without shifting.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Bend Arm Press
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start with your arm bent at your side. Exhale to press the arm upward while side-bending your torso.
2.Inhale, bend the arm and return your torso to an upright position.
3.Keep your torso facing forward throughout the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770709439053.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders down.\n2.Maintain stability in your pelvis and lower body."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to slowly return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your shoulders down; avoid shrugging.
2.Keep your lower body stable without swaying.

actionLibraryList.title: Side Kneeling Twist
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Bend the elbows and hold the band at chest height, engaging the core and keeping the pelvis stable. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, rotating through the thoracic spine to pull the band outward.
3.Inhale as the spine returns to neutral, controlling the torso to bring the band back to the starting position.
4.Maintain a neutral torso throughout, with the thighs facing forward.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628137151.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine.\n3.Keep the pelvis stable."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to return slowly.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down; avoid shrugging.
2.Maintain a neutral spine, keeping the pelvis and lower limbs stable without shifting.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Bend Arm Press
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start with your arm bent at your side. Exhale to press the arm upward while side-bending your torso.
2.Inhale, bend the arm and return your torso to an upright position.
3.Keep your torso facing forward throughout the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770709439053.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders down.\n2.Maintain stability in your pelvis and lower body."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to slowly return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your shoulders down; avoid shrugging.
2.Keep your lower body stable without swaying.

actionLibraryList.title: Child Pose
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start in a kneeling position with the knees hip-width apart. Press the tops of the feet into the mat, sit the hips back toward the heels, and keep the pelvis stable.
2.Lengthen the spine, then hinge forward from the hips. Gently rest the forehead on the mat, extending the arms forward or placing them alongside the body to allow a gentle stretch through the lats and lower back. Keep the hips as close to the heels as possible and breathe evenly throughout the stretch.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770690951913.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine with a stable pelvis."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch along the spine.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
2.Avoid arching the lower back.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Side Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit with your hands by your sides for support, shoulders down away from the ears, and core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale as you laterally flex the body to one side, reaching the opposite arm over the head to eye level.
3.Inhale, keeping the core engaged, and return the body to center. Exhale and repeat on the other side, alternating sides.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770689754482.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down.\n2.Anchor the sit bones on the mat, maintain a neutral pelvis, and avoid overarching the lower back."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to powerfully side bend.
Inhale to return to neutral.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
2.Keep the pelvis and core stable; do not let the lower back sag.
3.Maintain control; do not swing with momentum.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Open Book Arm Circle
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your side with a neutral spine. Relax the chest, align the pelvis and legs in a straight line with heels together. Extend the top arm forward at chest height and engage the core. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, move the top arm in a large circular motion overhead and behind, as far as comfortable.
3.Inhale as the arm swings back toward the front of the hip, returning to the starting position. Continue exhaling as you repeat the circular motion.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770689405356.jpg","context":"1.Let the shoulders relax and sink naturally.\n2.Keep the pelvis vertical to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to open and circle the arm.
Inhale to return and recover to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid tilting or rocking forward/backward.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed; avoid shrugging.
3.Maintain control of the arm; avoid swinging or using momentum.
